<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration; use function assert; use DOMDocument; use DOMElement; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class MoveAttributesFromRootToCoverage implements Migration { /** * @throws MigrationException */ public function migrate(DOMDocument $document): void { $map = [ 'disableCodeCoverageIgnore' => 'disableCodeCoverageIgnore', 'ignoreDeprecatedCodeUnitsFromCodeCoverage' => 'ignoreDeprecatedCodeUnits', ]; $root = $document->documentElement; assert($root instanceof DOMElement); $coverage = $document->getElementsByTagName('coverage')->item(0); if (!$coverage instanceof DOMElement) { throw new MigrationException('Unexpected state - No coverage element'); } foreach ($map as $old => $new) { if (!$root->hasAttribute($old)) { continue; } $coverage->setAttribute($new, $root->getAttribute($old)); $root->removeAttribute($old); } } }
